response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with notable strengths in system design, performance optimization, and Agile methodologies. However, his primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with limited evidence of deep C++ experience, STL mastery, or industrial cybersecurity (e.g., IEC 62443) required for this role. His background in embedded systems and low-latency applications is a partial fit, but the lack of recent C++-focused roles and cloud platform solutions raises concerns about his suitability for this specific position.
strengths: Strong background in performance-critical and low-latency systems (e.g., real-time data processing at Dunnhumby)
Experience with Agile methodologies, CI/CD, and modern development practices (TDD, pair programming)
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant C++ role was in 2015 at National Instruments)
No explicit mention of STL, object-oriented design, or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices required for IEC 62443 compliance
Lacks cloud platform experience (Microsoft Azure) and industrial automation protocol knowledge (Modbus, OPC UA)
